Provenance.drafts: 4 candidates generated locally via ComfyUI MCP (single pass, no escalation needed); curated per art/pipeline/README.md
Provenance.paintoverNote: c2 (seed+2) -- best 'crab wearing a borrowed skull' reading of the 4: a skull-headed, multi-legged crab-like creature with visible claws, clean gradient background. c0 and c3 drew skull-headed creatures with a spider/beetle or upright-humanoid stance rather than a crab; c1 was a tall stilt-legged skeletal figure with no crab silhouette at all.
Provenance.aiDisclosure: AI-generated (SDXL base 1.0) diffuse, background-removed via BiRefNet (cutout.py --trim); normal map derived via normalmap.py (Sobel height-from-luminance, strength 2.5) -- lit Monster world sprite per AssetSpec.NormalMap=true. Normal-map QA (windowed Sprite2D + textured PointLight2D pilot scene, deleted before commit, per art/pipeline/README.md) directly swept the light left/right on this asset -- bumps brightened toward the light on both sides, no caved-in/inverted relief. Passed on the existing Flip-Y-OFF import convention.
